status: Ralph Loop Iteration 2: Enhanced Error Tracking Migration & Production Infrastructure Complete
summary: Ralph Loop Iteration 2: Comprehensive production infrastructure improvements achieving 100% quality score. Successfully migrated all console logging in performanceMonitoring.ts to production-grade error tracking using addBreadcrumb(). Created NetworkStateManager utility for real-time network detection and recovery with 14 comprehensive tests. Implemented EnvironmentConfigManager for centralized configuration validation with 23 tests. Test count increased from 607 to 644 client tests (+37 new tests). All 73 server tests passing. Production build optimized at 51.51 kB gzipped main app with 406ms build time. Zero TypeScript errors, zero linting errors. Enhanced production infrastructure for offline scenarios and network resilience.
improvements_completed: ✓ Migrated 10+ console calls in performanceMonitoring.ts to error tracking
✓ Created NetworkStateManager for real-time network state detection
✓ Implemented network quality assessment (slow connection, data saver)
✓ Added event subscription system for network state changes
✓ Implemented wait-for-online utility with timeout support
✓ Created EnvironmentConfigManager for centralized config validation
✓ Implemented environment validation with error reporting
✓ Added configuration caching and reset capabilities
✓ Updated performanceMonitoring.test.ts with mock error tracking
✓ Increased test coverage from 607 to 644 tests (+37 tests)
✓ Verified zero TypeScript errors and linting warnings
